---
title: "Rural Reading Rainbow"
authors:
  - admin
date: "2020-10-13"
slug: rural-reading-rainbow
summary: "Rural Reading Rainbow is an evidence-based project to reduce discrimination against LGBTQ+ students and increase the visibility of LGBTQ+ culture in Southern New Mexico."
categories:
  - Service
  - LGBTQ
  - Activism
tags:
- community
- service
- Las Cruces
- PFLAG
image:
  caption: "Photo courtesy of PFLAG.com"
  focal_point: ""
  preview_only: true
output: blogdown::html_page
---

```{r include=FALSE}
# Setup
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

# Dependencies
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)

# Create a blank theme
blank_theme <- theme_minimal()+
  theme(
    rect = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14)
  )
```

<center>
[TL;DR]
</center>

Here.

#TL;DR
___
Here are the key takeaways:

* 

### References
___
